content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Drinks Choosing". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/1195/A
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Then T test cases follow. The first line of each test case contains two integers a and b. The second line contains an integer n. The third line contains n space-separated integers.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print the number of drinks you can choose.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Iterate through each number and check if it is divisible by a or b.
